item-salamander.name: Salamander
item-salamander.description: Dual blades set ablaze. Be careful you don't get burned, 'cause these swords are hot, hot, hot!

item-sapphire-rod.name: Sapphire Rod
item-sapphire-rod.description: A very cute rod. This is the best for those who care about the beauty of their hair.

item-schnabel.name: Schnabel
item-schnabel.description: A hammer designed to be small and light. Has good overall balance.

item-scrap-metal.name: Scrap Metal
item-scrap-metal.description: A super-duper awesomely spectacular piece of scrap metal that's super-duper useless to most people.

item-sea-cutter.name: Sea Cutter
item-sea-cutter.description: A sword that can supposedly divide the sea. Listen closely and you'll hear the sound of ocean waves.

item-seasoned-hoe.name: Seasoned Hoe
item-seasoned-hoe.description: A stronger hoe. Covers an even wider area when charged than the Sturdy Hoe.

item-shine-blade.name: Shine Blade
item-shine-blade.description: A sword with a high-heat blade and an ice-cold tip. Even evil hearts are soothed by its shiny glow.

item-shiny-hoe.name: Shiny Hoe
item-shiny-hoe.description: A hoe that glimmers like the sweat on your brow. Covers a very wide area when charged.

item-shooting-star-staff.name: Shooting Star Staff
item-shooting-star-staff.description: A staff inspired by speeding stars in the sky. Sadly, your speed will not become twice as fast.

item-short-dagger.name: Short Dagger
item-short-dagger.description: Hold one in each hand to overwhelm your foes.

item-silent-grave.name: Silent Grave
item-silent-grave.description: A spear with a removable knife-like blade at its tip. Has a sealing effect on enemies.

item-silver-hammer.name: Silver Hammer
item-silver-hammer.description: A hammer reinforced with silver. Can be charged to cover wider areas. Used to flatten soil.

item-silver-staff.name: Silver Staff
item-silver-staff.description: A staff made with sacred silver gems. Improves concentration, making it ideal for students.

item-skilled-pole.name: Skilled Pole
item-skilled-pole.description: A pole for novice fishers. Can be charged to attract fish from far away.

item-sky-hammer.name: Sky Hammer
item-sky-hammer.description: A hammer with wings. Very light and easy to use.

item-smash-blade.name: Smash Blade
item-smash-blade.description: A sword designed to target foe's vital points, no matter what style of form you use.

item-snakesword.name: Snakesword
item-snakesword.description: A sword made by connecting small bits of metal into one whip-like blade. Long-ranged and hard to avoid.

item-snow-crown.name: Snow Crown
item-snow-crown.description: A long sword imbued with water power. When plunged into snow, not a single flake will melt.

item-sonic-dagger.name: Sonic Dagger
item-sonic-dagger.description: Slim wind-elemental dual blades that move at sonic speed. You can hear the air itself being cut in two.

item-sorcerers-wand.name: Sorcerer's Wand
item-sorcerers-wand.description: An almighty staff. But a true sorcerer knows he actually knows nothing.

item-soul-eater.name: Soul Eater
item-soul-eater.description: a magical sword that eats souls. It has the power to take away an enemy's life.

item-spear.name: Spear
item-spear.description: A very simple spear, good for beginners. So simple that it's often used as a skewer for food.

item-spiked-hammer.name: Spiked Hammer
item-spiked-hammer.description: A hammer outfitted with spikes. Can easily score critical hits, hammer or no.

item-splash-star.name: Splash Star
item-splash-star.description: Hammer made by using magical power. As its name implies, it looks like splashing stars.

item-spoon.name: Spoon
item-spoon.description: A magic sword that somehow makes people want to eat pudding.

item-staff.name: Staff
item-staff.description: A simple, magical staff. Try it out and see what you can do with it!

item-steel-edge.name: Steel Edge
item-steel-edge.description: Weapon made with sharpened iron. Heavy, and requires considerable skill to wield.

item-steel-katana.name: Steel Katana
item-steel-katana.description: Solid swords reinforced with high heat. So sharp that they can cut steel.

item-steel-slicer.name: Steel Slicer
item-steel-slicer.description: Supposedly can cut through anything -- thus the name.

item-steel-sword.name: Steel Sword+
item-steel-sword.description: A strengthened version of the Steel Sword. Born anew with freshly-colored blades.

item-storm-wand.name: Storm Wand
item-storm-wand.description: A staff that is believed to be able to call storms. If it really does, it's gonna be a problem. Please don't try it.

item-strong-stone.name: Strong Stone
item-strong-stone.description: Large chunks of metal are connected to its head. High in attack due to its heavy weight.

item-sturdy-hoe.name: Sturdy Hoe
item-sturdy-hoe.description: A slightly stronger how. No longer chipped by rocks. Charge to cover a wider area.

item-sunspot.name: Sunspot
item-sunspot.description: A sword as hot as the sun. Some say it's so hot that it turns everything it strikes to ash.

item-super-sickle.name: Super Sickle
item-super-sickle.description: An outstanding sickle. Use it to cut weeds and plants. You can also cut crops to collect seeds.

item-sweet-potato-staff.name: Sweet Potato Staff
item-sweet-potato-staff.description: One autumn day, someone poked a roasted sweet potato with a broom. That's how this staff was created.

item-syringe.name: Syringe
item-syringe.description: A staff that is a fusion of treatment and injury made by a mad magic doctor. Not recommended for hospitals.

item-thief-knife.name: Thief Knife
item-thief-knife.description: Dual blades often used by pirates and thieves. Holding them somehow makes you feel more inherently aggressive.

item-tin-waterpot.name: Tin Waterpot
item-tin-waterpot.description: A tin waterpot. Tough heavy, it can be charged to water the field.

item-tomahawk.name: Tomahawk
item-tomahawk.description: An axe with a single blade. The tassel on its edge is always blowing in the wind.

item-toy-hammer.name: Toy Hammer
item-toy-hammer.description: Anyone hit by this hammer must pretend that it really hurts. It's the law! Raises chance of knockouts.

item-trident.name: Trident
item-trident.description: A three-pronged spear. Some lose their memory in shock when stabbed with it.

item-twin-blade.name: Twin Blade
item-twin-blade.description: Dual blades that can make you as strong as an ogre. The long blades help extend your reach. Also has a poisoning effect.

item-twin-justice.name: Twin Justice
item-twin-justice.description: Justice now comes in two. Twice the justice, twice the power. Mete it upon your foes for...Uh...great justice!

item-twin-leeks.name: Twin Leeks
item-twin-leeks.description: Leeks. Yes, leeks. Wielding them makes you feel like singing polka.

item-veggieblade.name: Veggieblade
item-veggieblade.description: A vegetable used as a sword. I wonder how much damage it can cause...

item-volcanon.name: Volcanon
item-volcanon.description: A sword imbued with fire. Beams out strong light. So hot, it raises the room temperature by 10 degrees.

item-war-hammer.name: War Hammer+
item-war-hammer.description: War Hammer imbued with magical power. Causes less strain on the back.

item-water-spear.name: Water Spear
item-water-spear.description: A Spear imbued with the magic power of water. It's always wet. Be careful not to let it slip out of your hands!

item-wind-edge.name: Wind Edge
item-wind-edge.description: Two roaring swords that create winds capable of slicing through enemies.

item-wind-sword.name: Wind Sword
item-wind-sword.description: A sword imbued with the magic power of wind. Each swing spawns a miniature gale.

item-wizards-staff.name: Wizard's Staff
item-wizards-staff.description: Proof that the bearer is a full-fledged wizard. You can feel you intelligence grow just by holding it.

item-wood-staff.name: Wood Staff
item-wood-staff.description: A hard, wooden club. It might hurt more to hit with it than to stab with it.

item-zweihaender.name: Zweihaender+
item-zweihaender.description: Zweihaender strengthened with special power. Hurts worse than a wedgie.

item-antidote-grass.name: Antidote Grass
item-antidote-grass.description: A grass that purifies poison in the body. Very bitter, but effective.

item-ayngondaia-lawn.name: Ayngondaia Lawn
item-ayngondaia-lawn.description: A rare plant. Imbued with incredible vitality, rumor has it that this bright bounty has rejuvenating qualities.

item-black-grass.name: Black Grass
item-black-grass.description: Grass with a dull, mysterious glow like muffled black light. Hard to see at night, so it's often stepped on.

item-blue-grass.name: Blue Grass
item-blue-grass.description: A nifty blue grass that's cold to the touch. Used in medicine due to its soothing effect.

item-fodder.name: Fodder
item-fodder.description: Feed for monsters. nutritious and sweet. Generally well-liked.

item-green-grass.name: Green Grass
item-green-grass.description: Plain green grass. Trying hard to change so people will stop calling it boring.

item-indigo-grass.name: Indigo Grass
item-indigo-grass.description: Soothing grass that supposedly resolves arguments just by being there.

item-medicinal-herb.name: Medicinal Herb
item-medicinal-herb.description: A wild herb with a bitter taste. Helps regain energy.

item-orange-grass.name: Orange Grass
item-orange-grass.description: Grass as orange as the sun. Its bright color gives you energy just by looking at it.

item-purple-grass.name: Purple Grass
item-purple-grass.description: A sophisticated purple grass. Has trouble getting along with the other grasses due to its massive ego.

item-red-grass.name: Red Grass
item-red-grass.description: Grass of passion. Its red color helps it grow faster than other grasses.

item-weeds.name: Weeds
item-weeds.description: Grows anywhere, anytime. It doesn't obey any rules. It does its down thing. And that's why it's cool.

item-white-grass.name: White Grass
item-white-grass.description: Beautiful grass of purest white. Hard to find in winter since it blends in with the snow. Fragile, but noble.

item-withered-grass.name: Withered Grass
item-withered-grass.description: You'd get sick if you ate this grass, but it can be used to improve the quality of soil.

item-yellow-grass.name: Yellow Grass
item-yellow-grass.description: Grass which brings you luck. People carry it in hopes that it will make them rich.

item-elli-leaves.name: Elli Leaves
item-elli-leaves.description: An exotic plant with a dark, blue flower. Beautiful!

item-big-autumn-grass.name: Big Autumn Grass
item-big-autumn-grass.description: A plant which grows colorful flowers. Named as it is due to its autumnal color scheme.

item-big-blue-crystal.name: Big Blue Crystal
item-big-blue-crystal.description: A flower made of rune crystals that mixed together in the ground. Appears blue during spring.

item-big-fireflower.name: Big Fireflower
item-big-fireflower.description: A flower with a unique shape. Also called the 'Mountain Fireworks,' as you can almost hear the sounds of exploding powder when you pluck it.

item-big-green-crystal.name: Big Green Crystal
item-big-green-crystal.description: A flower made of rune crystals that mixed together in the ground. Appears green during summer.

item-big-red-crystal.name: Big Red Crystal
item-big-red-crystal.description: A flower made of rune crystals that mixed together in the ground. Appears red during autumn.

item-big-white-crystal.name: Big White Crystal
item-big-white-crystal.description: A flower made of rune crystals that mixed together in the ground. Appears white during winter.

item-doom-pumpkin.name: Doom Pumpkin
item-doom-pumpkin.description: A nutritious seasonal vegetable. Can be worn during the autumn festival by scooping out the inside. A gourd of doom.

item-great-4-leaf-clover.name: Great 4-Leaf Clover
item-great-4-leaf-clover.description: A plant which brings you good luck. Carry it around or make it a gift, and happiness will follow you!

item-great-charm-blue.name: Great Charm Blue
item-great-charm-blue.description: A deep blue flower. Practically swallows you into its beautiful blossoms.

item-great-emery-flower.name: Great Emery Flower
item-great-emery-flower.description: A unique golden flower that's extremely tough and resilient. Don't step on it or it'll really hurt!

item-kaiser-lamp-grass.name: Kaiser Lamp Grass
item-kaiser-lamp-grass.description: A grass with luminous powder all throughout its blossomed stem. Has a strong calming effect.

item-king-cherry-grass.name: King Cherry Grass
item-king-cherry-grass.description: A plant that works hard to be prettier than all the other flowers. Other flowers sometimes sneer, but they're just jealous. Can be found in spring.

item-king-pink-cat.name: King Pink Cat
item-king-pink-cat.description: Flower with vibrant pink blossoms. Named 'cat' for its cuteness.

item-king-pom-pom-grass.name: King Pom-Pom Grass
item-king-pom-pom-grass.description: Has white cotton-like flowers in its center. Looks cute like a dandelion, but is poisonous, so say no to the blow!

item-large-noel-grass.name: Large Noel Grass
item-large-noel-grass.description: Weirdly tree-shaped plant. Can be fun to decorate in winter.

item-super-ironleaf.name: Super Ironleaf
item-super-ironleaf.description: A plant with 1000 spikes. Its unique shape is the result of iron content collected from the ground.

item-ultra-moondrop-flower.name: Ultra Moondrop Flower
item-ultra-moondrop-flower.description: A unique and beautiful yellow flower that grows in the moonlight.

item-ultra-toyherb.name: Ultra Toyherb
item-ultra-toyherb.description: An herb that promotes good health. Hard to grow, but cures fatigue.

item-amethyst.name: Amethyst
item-amethyst.description: A gem long known for its mysterious energy. Symbolizes peace of mind.

item-aquamarine.name: Aquamarine
item-aquamarine.description: A gem as blue as the deep sea. Symbolizes calmness.

item-big-crystal.name: Big Crystal
item-big-crystal.description: A big crystal made of something that's been mixed together. It is said that it's made up of people's thoughts.

item-bronze.name: Bronze
item-bronze.description: A type of mineral used in the forging of items and accessories. Pretty common.

item-diamond.name: Diamond
item-diamond.description: A very hard gem known as the 'King of Gemstones.' Symbolizes purity.

item-dragonic-stone.name: Dragonic Stone
item-dragonic-stone.description: A mineral that was believed not to exist in reality.

item-earth-crystal.name: Earth Crystal
item-earth-crystal.description: Crystallized earth magic. Hard as a rock.

item-emerald.name: Emerald
item-emerald.description: A beautiful green-colored gem symbolizing happiness. Those that are clear and smooth are the most valuable.

item-glitta-augite.name: Glitta Augite
item-glitta-augite.description: A strange stone produced by a tree. Emits strong light. If used for reinforcing a weapon, extends the range.

item-gold.name: Gold
item-gold.description: A type of mineral used in the forging of items and accessories. Valuable and highly sought after.

item-invisible-stone.name: Invisible Stone
item-invisible-stone.description: A stone that is invisible. Difficult to find for obvious reasons. It's classified as a monster in a country to the east.

item-iron.name: Iron
item-iron.description: A type of mineral used in the forging of items and accessories. Found everywhere.

item-light-ore.name: Light Ore
item-light-ore.description: A highly rare ore that can be used to change a weapon's category.

item-orichalcum.name: Orichalcum
item-orichalcum.description: A legendary ore used for making weapons or accessories.

item-platinum.name: Platinum
item-platinum.description: A type of mineral used in the forging of items and accessories. Extremely rare and hard to find

item-ruby.name: Ruby
item-ruby.description: A red-colored gem symbolizing passion. Those that cast star-shaped reflections are particularly valuable.

item-rune-crystal.name: Rune Crystal
item-rune-crystal.description: Runes that crystallized naturally. Feels warm somehow.

item-sapphire.name: Sapphire
item-sapphire.description: A gem that comes in different colors such as pink, blue, yellow and green. Symbolizes love.

item-shade-stone.name: Shade Stone
item-shade-stone.description: A rare stone that absorbs all surrounding light. Often used to blot out the world when darkness is preferred.

item-silver.name: Silver
item-silver.description: A type of mineral used in the forging of items and accessories. Valuable and highly sought after.

item-small-crystal.name: Small Crystal
item-small-crystal.description: Runes that have crystallized over the years. Very rare.

item-white-stone.name: White Stone
item-white-stone.description: There's a legend that women who were asked to marry while being presented with this stone lived happily ever after.

item-branch.name: Branch
item-branch.description: A tree branch that blew in. Chop it up with an axe to make Lumber.

item-lumber.name: Lumber
item-lumber.description: Wood needed to build buildings. Always keep a lot of them in stock -- they will absolutely come in handy!

item-material-stone.name: Material Stone
item-material-stone.description: Stones needed to build buildings. Always keep a lot of them in stock -- they will absolutely come in handy!

item-rock.name: Rock
item-rock.description: An ordinary rock. Hit it with a hammer to make usable material out of it.

item-antidote-potion.name: Antidote Potion
item-antidote-potion.description: Easier to take than herbs. Used for curing poison.

item-cold-medicine.name: Cold Medicine
item-cold-medicine.description: Caught a cold? Nine out of ten doctors agree this medicine will cure it. And the tenth one is a quack.

item-formuade.name: Formuade
item-formuade.description: RP+75% HP max -50% STR +70 VIT +70 INT +70 Crit +20% Psn Res 25% Seal Res 25% Par Res 25% Slp Res 25% Ftg Res 25% Sick Res 25%Faint Res 25%Medicine made from fertilizer. Tastes awful, but whatever doesn't kill you can only make you stronger, right?

item-formula-a.name: Formula A
item-formula-a.description: Sprinkle on soil to grow crops faster. It's somewhat effective.

item-formula-b.name: Formula B
item-formula-b.description: Sprinkle on soil to grow crops faster. It's pretty effective.

item-formula-c.name: Formula C
item-formula-c.description: Sprinkle on soil to grow crops faster. It's super effective!

item-giantizer.name: Giantizer
item-giantizer.description: Sprinkle on soil to grow gargantuan produce.

item-greenifier.name: Greenifier+
item-greenifier.description: An item used to raise soil quality. Improves soil's ability to grow higher-level crops.

item-healing-potion.name: Healing Potion
item-healing-potion.description: A deep green-colored medicinal drink. Recovers HP.

item-leveliser.name: Leveliser
item-leveliser.description: A medicine made from a hodge-podge of things. Heats your body and increases your level.

item-magical-potion.name: Magical Potion
item-magical-potion.description: One of the greatest achievements of magic medical science. Was only possible through the greatest of efforts.

item-minimizer.name: Minimizer
item-minimizer.description: Sprinkle on soil to grow smaller plants. Also makes soil healthier.

item-mystery-potion.name: Mystery Potion
item-mystery-potion.description: A blue-colored medicinal drink. Recovers HP.

item-no-rot.name: No Rot β
item-no-rot.description: Sprinkle on soil to prevent plants from wilting. It's more effective than the α version.

item-object-x.name: Object X
item-object-x.description: A substance created from a failed Synthesis. How did it happen? Who knows, but it's not for eating. Seriously.

item-recovery-potion.name: Recovery Potion
item-recovery-potion.description: A light green-colored medicinal drink. Recovers HP.

item-wettable-powder.name: Wettable Powder
item-wettable-powder.description: Sprinkle on soil to make plants stronger against typhoons and snowstorms.

item-apple-tree-seeds.name: Apple Tree Seeds
item-apple-tree-seeds.description: Doesn't grow well in winter. Once it grows into a tree, it will produce apples every day.

item-autumn-grass-seeds.name: Autumn Grass Seeds
item-autumn-grass-seeds.description: Grows well in fall, but not in winter. Takes a long time to grow. Its seed is red and round.

item-blue-crystal-seeds.name: Blue Crystal Seeds
item-blue-crystal-seeds.description: Grows well in spring, but not in other seasons. Takes a long time to grow. Its seed resembles blue crystal.

item-bok-choy-seeds.name: Bok Choy Seeds
item-bok-choy-seeds.description: Grows well in fall, but not in summer. Weak to heat.

item-cabbage-seeds.name: Cabbage Seeds
item-cabbage-seeds.description: Grows well in spring and fall. Grows fast, and rarely withers.

item-carrot-seeds.name: Carrot Seeds
item-carrot-seeds.description: Grows well in fall. A well-balanced crop that's easy on the soil.

item-charm-blue-seeds.name: Charm Blue Seeds
item-charm-blue-seeds.description: Grows well in fall, but not in winter. Easy to grow, with a good balance of growth rate and resilience.

item-cherry-grass-seeds.name: Cherry Grass Seeds
item-cherry-grass-seeds.description: Grows well in spring, but not in winter. Grows a light pink flower.

item-clover-seeds.name: Clover Seeds
item-clover-seeds.description: Grows well in spring and fall, but not in summer. A lucky seed that brings good fortune, but withers very easily.

item-corn-seeds.name: Corn Seeds
item-corn-seeds.description: Grows well from spring to summer, but not in winter. Improves the soil til you till it without harvesting.

item-cucumber-seeds.name: Cucumber Seeds
item-cucumber-seeds.description: Grows well from spring to summer, but not in winter. Hearty ones may grow again after harvesting

item-dungeon-seed.name: Dungeon Seed
item-dungeon-seed.description: Grows into a dungeon. Depending on the level of the seed, it may bloom into a particularly difficult one.

item-eggplant-seeds.name: Eggplant Seeds
item-eggplant-seeds.description: Grows well from spring to summer, but not in winter. Hearty ones may grow again after harvesting.

item-emery-flower-seeds.name: Emery Flower Seeds
item-emery-flower-seeds.description: Takes a very long time to grow. Rarely withers, and can be cultivated by almost anyone.

item-fireflower-seeds.name: Fireflower Seeds
item-fireflower-seeds.description: Grows well in summer, but not in winter. Its seeds are as black as gunpowder.

item-fodder-seeds.name: Fodder Seeds
item-fodder-seeds.description: Grow feed for the monsters. Hearty ones may grow again after harvesting.

item-gold-cabbage-seeds.name: Gold Cabbage Seeds
item-gold-cabbage-seeds.description: Grows well in winter, but not in summer. Grows into a gorgeous golden cabbage.

item-gold-potato-seeds.name: Gold Potato Seeds
item-gold-potato-seeds.description: Grows well in winter, but not in summer. Grows into a gorgeous golden potato.

item-gold-pumpkin-seeds.name: Gold Pumpkin Seeds
item-gold-pumpkin-seeds.description: Grows well in winter, but not in summer. Grows into a gorgeous golden pumpkin. May grow again after harvesting.

item-gold-turnip-seeds.name: Gold Turnip Seeds
item-gold-turnip-seeds.description: Grows well in winter, but not in summer. Grows into a gorgeous golden turnip.

item-green-crystal-seeds.name: Green Crystal Seeds
item-green-crystal-seeds.description: Grows well in Summer, but not in other seasons. Takes a long time to grow. Its seed resembles green crystal.

item-green-pepper-seeds.name: Green Pepper Seeds
item-green-pepper-seeds.description: Grows well in summer, but not in winter. Highly nutritious. Hearty ones may grow again after harvesting.

item-hot-hot-seeds.name: Hot-Hot Seeds
item-hot-hot-seeds.description: Grows well in winter, but not in summer. Takes some time to grow, but is easy to harvest and doesn't wither easily.

item-ironleaf-seeds.name: Ironleaf Seeds
item-ironleaf-seeds.description: Grows well in winter, but not in summer. Takes a long time to grow. Has a special power to gather iron from the soil.

item-lamp-grass-seeds.name: Lamp Grass Seeds
item-lamp-grass-seeds.description: Grows well in winter. Takes a long time to grow. Mainly used as an ingredient in medicines.

item-leek-seeds.name: Leek Seeds
item-leek-seeds.description: Grows well in spring and fall, but not in summer. Withers fairly easily, but is easy on the soil.

item-moondrop-seeds.name: Moondrop Seeds
item-moondrop-seeds.description: Grows well in spring and fall, but not in winter. An easy flower to grow.

item-noel-grass-seeds.name: Noel Grass Seeds
item-noel-grass-seeds.description: Grows well in winter, but not in summer. Takes a long time to grow but rarely withers. Used in certain festivals.

item-onion-seeds.name: Onion Seeds
item-onion-seeds.description: Grows well in fall. Easy to harvest and easy on the soil

item-orange-tree-seed.name: Orange Tree Seed
item-orange-tree-seed.description: Doesn't grow well in winter. Once it grows into a tree, it will produce orances every day.

item-pineapple-seeds.name: Pineapple Seeds
item-pineapple-seeds.description: Grows well in summer, but not in other seasons. Takes time to grow. May grow again after harvesting, but tough on soil.

item-pink-cat-seeds.name: Pink Cat Seeds
item-pink-cat-seeds.description: Grows well in summer, but not in winter. Grows fast, is easy to harvest, but withers fast.

item-pink-turnip-seeds.name: Pink Turnip Seeds
item-pink-turnip-seeds.description: Grows well in spring, but not in winter. Grows a beautiful pink turnip. Easy to harvest. Popular with novice farmers.

item-pom-pom-grass-sds.name: Pom-Pom Grass Sds.
item-pom-pom-grass-sds.description: Grows well in fall, but not in winter. Takes a long time to grow. Its seed is white and soft.

item-potato-seeds.name: Potato Seeds
item-potato-seeds.description: Grows well from spring to summer, but not in winter. Grows beautiful flowers.

item-pumpkin-seeds.name: Pumpkin Seeds
item-pumpkin-seeds.description: Grows well from spring to summer, but not in winter. Easy on the soil. May grow again after harvesting.

item-radish-seeds.name: Radish Seeds
item-radish-seeds.description: Grows well in fall, but not in summer. Has a good balance of growth rate and resilience. Easy on the soil.

item-red-crystal-seeds.name: Red Crystal Seeds
item-red-crystal-seeds.description: Grows well in fall, but not in other seasons. Takes a long time to grow. Its seed resembles a red crystal.

item-shield-seed.name: Shield Seed
item-shield-seed.description: Grows into a shield. Cool, right?

item-spinach-seeds.name: Spinach Seeds
item-spinach-seeds.description: Grows well in fall. Grows fast, but withers quickly. Don't forget to water it every day!

item-strawberry-seeds.name: Strawberry Seeds
item-strawberry-seeds.description: Grows well in spring and fall. Bears sweet fruits. Hearty ones may grow again after harvesting.

item-sword-seed.name: Sword Seed
item-sword-seed.description: Grows into a sword. Neat, huh?

item-tomato-seeds.name: Tomato Seeds
item-tomato-seeds.description: Grows well from spring to summer, but not in winter. Grows nutritious tomatoes. May grow again after harvesting.

item-toyherb-seeds.name: Toyherb Seeds
item-toyherb-seeds.description: Grows well in spring but not in winter. A fast grower, but delicate and tough to harvest. Cures fatigue if fully grown.

item-turnip-seeds.name: Turnip Seeds
item-turnip-seeds.description: Grows well from summer to fall. Most common crop in the game, for some reason.

item-white-crystal-seeds.name: White Crystal Seeds
item-white-crystal-seeds.description: Grows well in winter, but not in other seasons. Takes a long time to grow. Its seed resembles a white crystal.

item-yam-seeds.name: Yam Seeds
item-yam-seeds.description: Grows well from summer to fall, but not in winter. Easy on the soil.

item-autumn-headdress.name: Autumn Headdress
item-autumn-headdress.description: A headdress that makes you feel autumn-y. People who love autumn have merciful hearts.

item-spring-headdress.name: Spring Headdress
item-spring-headdress.description: A headdress that makes you feel spring-y. People who love spring have pure hearts.

item-summer-headdress.name: Summer Headdress
item-summer-headdress.description: A headdress that makes you feel summer-y. People who love summer have strong hearts.

item-winter-headdress.name: Winter Headdress
item-winter-headdress.description: A headdress that makes you feel winter-y. People who love winter have open hearts.

item-avenger-rock.name: Avenger Rock
item-avenger-rock.description: Stabs its target with a large rock. Also known as the "drill punch."

item-axel-disaster.name: Axel Disaster
item-axel-disaster.description: Weapon: SpearSpinning and boring. Must face the enemy head-on to inflict continuous damage.

item-big-fire.name: Big Fire
item-big-fire.description: Hurls large fireballs. Can hurl up to 2 at a time.

item-blitz.name: Blitz
item-blitz.description: Weapon: Dual BladesSpeed up attack rate by sharpening concentration.

item-bonus-concerto.name: Bonus Concerto
item-bonus-concerto.description: a musical score that inspires allied monsters to do their best in combat.

item-cure.name: Cure
item-cure.description: Recovers HP, for yourself and for nearby companions. Doesn't recover much, but uses few RP.

item-cure-all.name: Cure All
item-cure-all.description: Recovers a lot of HP for you and your companions, even if they're not close by. Uses lots of RP.

item-cyclone.name: Cyclone
item-cyclone.description: Weapon: FistBlow away enemies by spinning your body super fast.

item-dark-ball.name: Dark Ball
item-dark-ball.description: Emits a dark light ball that travels slowly that travels slowly and destroys everything in its way.

item-dark-snake.name: Dark Snake
item-dark-snake.description: Emits a dark light ball that snakes forward slowly and destroys everything in its path.

item-darkness.name: Darkness
item-darkness.description: Forbidden spell that summons an entrance to the depths of darkness.

item-dash-slash.name: Dash Slash
item-dash-slash.description: Weapon: Short SwordClose the gap between enemies in an instant. Good timing may net you an additional leg drop.

item-delta-laser.name: Delta Laser
item-delta-laser.description: Emits 3 water beams that can penetrate stone. Particularly effective when surrounded by foes.

item-delta-strike.name: Delta Strike
item-delta-strike.description: Weapon: Long SwordA fluid attack of lunging and cutting.

item-double-kick.name: Double Kick
item-double-kick.description: Weapon: FistSpin and kick enemies so hard.

item-double-sonic.name: Double Sonic
item-double-sonic.description: Emits 2 spinning wind blades. Their arched trajectory makes it hard to attack enemies in front.

item-earth-spike.name: Earth Spike
item-earth-spike.description: Summons stone pillars that track enemies and strike them from below.

item-explosion.name: Explosion
item-explosion.description: Hurls giant fireballs that cause explosions on impact, damaging their surroundings.

item-fireball.name: Fireball
item-fireball.description: Hurls small fireballs. Can hurl up to 3 at a time.

item-flash-strike.name: Flash Strike
item-flash-strike.description: Weapon: Long SwordBlow away foes with one swing. Covers wide areas very effectively.

item-giga-swing.name: Giga Swing
item-giga-swing.description: Weapon: Axe/HammerWith its incredible strength, enemies are blown back until they hit something.

item-grand-impact.name: Grand Impact
item-grand-impact.description: Weapon: Axe/HammerHit the ground and cause an earthquake. Press the button for multiple hits.

item-greeting-spell.name: Greeting Spell
item-greeting-spell.description: If you say hello, even people who don't like you will say hi back. They'll be your special friends. Your special awake friends.

item-gust.name: Gust
item-gust.description: Weapon: Dual BladesJump up and soar in the air. Also useful for dodging attacks.

item-hurricane.name: Hurricane
item-hurricane.description: Weapon: SpearA fancy attack with a toss, spin and juggle.

item-iron-waltz.name: Iron Waltz
item-iron-waltz.description: A musical score that powers up allied monsters' defense until the end of the day.

item-light-barrier.name: Light Barrier
item-light-barrier.description: Emits 2 light balls in front of you, protecting from enemies.

item-master-cure.name: Master Cure
item-master-cure.description: Greatly recovers HP, but consumes a large amount of RP in the process.

item-mediparalyze.name: Mediparalyze
item-mediparalyze.description: Cures paralysis.A purifying light will enable you to move once more.

item-medipoison.name: Medipoison
item-medipoison.description: Cures poison.A purifying light will cleanse the toxins in your body.

item-mediseal.name: Mediseal
item-mediseal.description: Cures seals.A purifying light will bring back your inner power.

item-millionstrike.name: Millionstrike
item-millionstrike.description: Weapon: SpearA swift stab. Creates shock waves to hit multiple times.

item-mind-thrust.name: Mind Thrust
item-mind-thrust.description: Weapon: Short SwordFind and attack your enemy's weak point. May inflict status ailments as well.

item-naive-blade.name: Naive Blade
item-naive-blade.description: Weapon: Long SwordAnticipate your enemy's attacks and quickly strike back.

item-neko-damashi.name: Neko Damashi
item-neko-damashi.description: Weapon: Open HandA legendary technique using palm of the hand to cause distress and surprise all in one.

item-parallel-laser.name: Parallel Laser
item-parallel-laser.description: Emits 2 water beams that can penetrate stone. The longer you maintain them, the bigger the impact.

item-penetrate-sonic.name: Penetrate Sonic
item-penetrate-sonic.description: Emits 3 spinning wind blades that move freely in multiple directions, shredding to bits all who get in their way.

item-power-wave.name: Power Wave
item-power-wave.description: Weapon: Short SwordCharge power to release shock waves.

item-prism.name: Prism
item-prism.description: Emits spinning light balls. Provides complete protection from all enemies for a short while.

item-rail-strike.name: Rail Strike
item-rail-strike.description: Weapon: Dual BladesA jump-spin attack. Dynamic and hard to counter.

item-rapid-move.name: Rapid Move
item-rapid-move.description: Weapon: FistMove toward an enemy in an instant. Also useful to dodge attacks.

item-reaper-slash.name: Reaper Slash
item-reaper-slash.description: Weapon: SpearLong-ranged attack. Best when surrounded.

item-round-break.name: Round Break
item-round-break.description: Weapon: Short SwordA cyclone attack that blows away foes. Great to use when surrounded.

item-rush-attack.name: Rush Attack
item-rush-attack.description: Weapon: Short SwordPress the button repeatedly for additional attacks and a finisher.

item-rush-punch.name: Rush Punch
item-rush-punch.description: Weapon: FistPunch many times at high speed. enemies are already dead.

item-screw-rock.name: Screw Rock
item-screw-rock.description: Summons sharp rocks that substitute for your fists. Designed for fighter mages.

item-shine.name: Shine
item-shine.description: Emits 4 light balls that spin around you, protecting you from enemies.

item-sonic-wind.name: Sonic Wind
item-sonic-wind.description: Emits spinning wind blades that automatically track and shred their foes to pieces.

item-stardust-upper.name: Stardust Upper
item-stardust-upper.description: Weapon: Axe/HammerKnock enemies into the air. They can also be attacked while spinning.

item-steel-heart.name: Steel Heart
item-steel-heart.description: Weapon: Long SwordBecome strong enough not to stagger when attacked, but take more damage.

item-storm.name: Storm
item-storm.description: Weapon: Dual BladesExecute continuous attacks in the air. Keep pressing the button for additional moves.

item-straight-punch.name: Straight Punch
item-straight-punch.description: Weapon: FistConcentrate and give foes a strong blow.

item-striking-march.name: Striking March
item-striking-march.description: A musical score that powers up allied monsters' strength until the end of the day.

item-tornado-swing.name: Tornado Swing
item-tornado-swing.description: Weapon: Axe/HammerSpinning lunge attack. Keep pressing the button to increase the number of spins. Just don't make yourself dizzy!

item-twin-attack.name: Twin Attack
item-twin-attack.description: Weapon: Dual BladesStab, twist and pull -- like a psychotic mantra. Simple but effective.

item-upper-cut.name: Upper Cut
item-upper-cut.description: Weapon: FistLaunch enemies into the air.

item-water-laser.name: Water Laser
item-water-laser.description: Emits a water beam that can penetrate stone. The longer you maintain it, the bigger the impact.

item-wind-slash.name: Wind Slash
item-wind-slash.description: Weapon: Long SwordA vertical jump-spin attack. Keep pressing the button to increase the number of spins.

item-brush.name: Brush
item-brush.description: An item used to brush monsters. Capable of grooming just about anything!

item-clippers.name: Clippers
item-clippers.description: An item used to trim and clip Wooly fur. Designed not to hurt its target.

item-magnifying-glass.name: Magnifying Glass
item-magnifying-glass.description: An item used to check soil quality. Equip and examine fields to learn more about your crops.

item-heart-drink.name: Heart Drink
item-heart-drink.description: A specially made medicine. Increases maximum HP.

item-intelligencer.name: Intelligencer
item-intelligencer.description: A specially made medicine. Increases maximum intelligence.

item-the-protein.name: The Protein
item-the-protein.description: A specially made medicine. Increases maximum strength. Get fit, brah.

item-vital-gummi.name: Vital Gummi
item-vital-gummi.description: A specially made medicine. Increases maximum vitality.
